results.full_response:
Bukhar ke kai karan ho sakte hain, jaise ki typhoid, saamanya bukhar, ya TB. Agar aapke bukhar mein yeh lakshan hain: 
- Dheere-dheere badhta bukhar
- Pet dard
- Dast ya kabj
- Sir dard
- Thakan
- Bhookh na lagna
Toh aapko doctor se milna chahiye. 

Aap paracetamol 500mg le sakte hain, zyada se zyada paani, nariyal paani, ORS pi sakte hain, गीला kapda mathe pe rakh sakte hain, aur zyada kapdein mat pahnein. 

Agar aapke bukhar mein yeh lakshan hain: 
- Hafte se zyada rahe
- Saas lene mein awaaz aaye (wheeze)
- Tez bukhar ho
- Bacha kuch bhi khana-peena band kare
Toh aapko turant doctor ke paas jana chahiye. 

Yaad rahein: Main doctor nahi hoon. Serious takleef mein turant doctor se milein. ⚠️

results.query: मुझे दस्त हो रहे हैं और पेट में दर्द है
results.response_preview:
आपको दस्त और पेट में दर्द हो रहा है, जो कि कई कारणों से हो सकता है। यह एक सामान्य समस्या है जो आहार, पाचन तंत्र, या किसी अन्य स्वास्थ्य समस्या के कारण हो सकती है। 

कुछ घरेलू उपाय जो आपको मदद कर सकते ...
results.full_response:
आपको दस्त और पेट में दर्द हो रहा है, जो कि कई कारणों से हो सकता है। यह एक सामान्य समस्या है जो आहार, पाचन तंत्र, या किसी अन्य स्वास्थ्य समस्या के कारण हो सकती है। 

कुछ घरेलू उपाय जो आपको मदद कर सकते हैं:

1. पर्याप्त पानी पीना और तरल पदार्थों का सेवन करना।
2. हल्का और आसानी से पचने वाला भोजन करना।
3. मसालेदार और तैलीय भोजन से परहेज करना।
4. नारियल पानी या अन्य इलेक्ट्रोलाइट युक्त पेय पदार्थ पीना।

यदि आपके लक्षण गंभीर हैं या लंबे समय तक बने रहते हैं, तो डॉक्टर से परामर्श करना उचित होगा। वे आपको उचित निदान और उपचार प्रदान कर सकते हैं।

⚠️ याद रखें: मैं डॉक्टर नहीं हूं। गंभीर समस्याओं में तुरंत डॉक्टर से मिलें।

results.full_response:
Aapko 1 hafte se khansi aa rahi hai. Yeh khansi kayi wajah se ho sakti hai, jaise ki thanda, TB, ya koi anya sankraman. Agar aapke khansi ke saath koi anya lakshan bhi hain, jaise ki bukhar, saas lene mein takleef, ya khoon wali khansi, to aapko turant doctor se milna chahiye.

Aap ghar par kuch upay kar sakte hain, jaise ki garam paani mein namak daalkar gargle karna, adrak, tulsi, shahad wali chai peena, aur paani zyada peena. Lekin agar aapki khansi 2 hafte se zyada rahe, to aapko doctor ke paas zaroor jaana chahiye.

⚠️ Yaad rahein: Main doctor nahi hoon. Serious takleef mein turant doctor se milein.

results.query: meri aankhein aur twacha peeli ho gayi hai
results.response_preview: Aapki aankhein aur twacha peeli ho gayi hai, yeh jaundice (piliya) ka lakshan ho sakta hai. Jaundice ke kai karan ho sakte hain, jaise ki liver ki samasya, bile duct ki samasya, ya anya chikitsa sthit...
results.full_response:
Aapki aankhein aur twacha peeli ho gayi hai, yeh jaundice (piliya) ka lakshan ho sakta hai. Jaundice ke kai karan ho sakte hain, jaise ki liver ki samasya, bile duct ki samasya, ya anya chikitsa sthitiyan. 

Aapko turant doctor se sampark karna chahiye, khaaskar agar aapko bukhar, pet dard, ya anya gambhir lakshan hain. Doctor aapki jaanch karke sahi nidan aur upchar batayenge. 

Aap ghar par paani bahut zyada pi sakte hain, ganna juice, nariyal paani pi sakte hain, aur tel-masale se parhez kar sakte hain. Lekin yeh mahatvapoorna hai ki aap doctor ki salah lein aur unke nirdeshon ka palan karein.

Yaad rakhein, main doctor nahi hoon, isliye aapko turant doctor se sampark karna chahiye. 

⚠️ Yaad rahein: Main doctor nahi hoon. Serious takleef mein turant doctor se milein.

results.query: mujhe tez bukhar hai aur kaanpna ho raha hai
results.response_preview: Aapko tez bukhar aur kaanpna ho raha hai. Yeh kai wajahon se ho sakta hai, jaise ki viral infection, bacterial infection, ya kisi anya samasya ke karan. Aapko paracetamol 500mg lena chahiye (yadi aapk...
results.full_response:
Aapko tez bukhar aur kaanpna ho raha hai. Yeh kai wajahon se ho sakta hai, jaise ki viral infection, bacterial infection, ya kisi anya samasya ke karan. Aapko paracetamol 500mg lena chahiye (yadi aapko doctor ne kuch aur nahi bataya hai) aur zyada se zyada paani, nariyal paani, ya ORS piyein. Agar aapko 2 din ke andar aaraam nahi milta hai ya aapke lakshan aur bhi kharab hote hain, to aapko doctor se milna chahiye. 

⚠️ Yaad rahein: Main doctor nahi hoon. Serious takleef mein turant doctor se milein.

results.response_preview:
Paracetamol bukhar aur dard ki ek aam dawai hai. Isse lete samay kuch baatein yaad rakhni chahiye:
1. Ise har 4-6 ghante mein 1 tablet (650mg) le sakte hain, lekin 24 ghante mein 4 se zyada tablet na ...
results.full_response:
Paracetamol bukhar aur dard ki ek aam dawai hai. Isse lete samay kuch baatein yaad rakhni chahiye:
1. Ise har 4-6 ghante mein 1 tablet (650mg) le sakte hain, lekin 24 ghante mein 4 se zyada tablet na lein.
2. Agar aapko liver ki koi samasya hai, to doctor ki salah lekar hi lein.
3. Isse khali pet nahi lena chahiye, khaane ke baad ya saath lena behtar hai.
4. Bacchon ko dena hai to unki umar aur wazan ke hisab se dose tay karein, aur doctor ki salah lein.

Yaad rakhein, yeh jaankari sirf jaankari ke liye hai, aur isse medical salah nahi samjhein. Agar aapko koi serious takleef hai, to turant doctor se milein.
⚠️ Yaad rahein: Main doctor nahi hoon. Serious takleef mein turant doctor se milein.

results.query: ORS ka ghol kaise banate hain?
results.response_preview: ORS ka ghol banane ke liye, 1 ORS packet ko 1 litre saaf paani mein ghol lein. Isse shareer ka paani aur namak wapas karne mein madad milti hai, jo dast aur ulti mein bahut zaroori hota hai. Yeh dawai...
results.full_response:
ORS ka ghol banane ke liye, 1 ORS packet ko 1 litre saaf paani mein ghol lein. Isse shareer ka paani aur namak wapas karne mein madad milti hai, jo dast aur ulti mein bahut zaroori hota hai. Yeh dawai nahi hai, balki shareer ka paani aur salt wapas karta hai. Dast mein sabse pehle yahi piyen. 

Ghar par ORS banane ke liye, 1 litre paani + 6 chhoti chammach cheeni + आधी chhoti chammach namak ka mishran bana sakte hain.

⚠️ Yaad rahein: Main doctor nahi hoon. Serious takleef mein turant doctor se milein.

results.response_preview: Iron tablets ko khali pet ya dopahar mein lena chahiye. Iske saath nimbu paani ya orange juice lena faydemand hai kyunki iron absorb hota hai. Doodh, chai, ya calcium tablets ke saath lena avoid karei...
results.full_response:
Iron tablets ko khali pet ya dopahar mein lena chahiye. Iske saath nimbu paani ya orange juice lena faydemand hai kyunki iron absorb hota hai. Doodh, chai, ya calcium tablets ke saath lena avoid karein kyunki iron absorb nahi hota. 

⚠️ Yaad rahein: Main doctor nahi hoon. Serious takleef mein turant doctor se milein.

results.query: Metformin ke side effects kya hain?
results.response_preview: Metformin ki side effects mein pet mein dard, dast, ulti, aur allergy ho sakti hai. Agar aapko chehre par sujan ya saas lene mein takleef hoti hai, to turant doctor se milein. Metformin type 2 diabete...
results.full_response:
Metformin ki side effects mein pet mein dard, dast, ulti, aur allergy ho sakti hai. Agar aapko chehre par sujan ya saas lene mein takleef hoti hai, to turant doctor se milein. Metformin type 2 diabetes ki dawai hai aur sirf doctor ke likhe hone par leni chahiye. Khane ke saath ya khane ke turant baad lein, khali pet nahi. Doctor ke bataye anusaar dose lena zaroori hai, khud dose mat badhaayen.
⚠️ Yaad rahein: Main doctor nahi hoon. Serious takleef mein turant doctor se milein.

results.query: Ayushman Bharat kya hai aur mujhe kaise milega?
results.response_preview: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY) Bharat sarkar ki sabse badi health insurance yojana hai, jiske tahat aapko 5 lakh rupaye tak ka muft ilaaj mil sakta hai. Iska labh ube pariv...
results.full_response:
Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY) Bharat sarkar ki sabse badi health insurance yojana hai, jiske tahat aapko 5 lakh rupaye tak ka muft ilaaj mil sakta hai. Iska labh ube parivaar ko milega, jo SECC 2011 data mein shaamil hain, Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY) card wale hain, BPL card wale hain, aur anya shartein poora karte hain. Aapko iska labh lene ke liye apne jila aspatal ya CSC center mein jana hoga, jahan aapko ration card aur Aadhar card saath lana hoga. Iske alawa, aap ASHA worker se bhi sampark kar sakte hain, jo aapko is yojana ke bare mein adhik jaankari pradaan kar sakti hain. Yaad rakhein, yeh ek muft ilaaj yojana hai, isliye kisi bhi tarah ka paisa dena mat. 

⚠️ Yaad rahein: Main doctor nahi hoon. Serious takleef mein turant doctor se milein.

results.query: pregnant mahila ko kya government schemes milti hain?
results.response_preview: Garbhavati mahilaon ke liye kai sarkari yojnayein hain, jaise ki Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY), Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY), aur Ayushman Bharat Yojana. In yojnayon ke tahat, garbhavati...
results.full_response:
Garbhavati mahilaon ke liye kai sarkari yojnayein hain, jaise ki Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY), Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY), aur Ayushman Bharat Yojana. In yojnayon ke tahat, garbhavati mahilaon ko vibhinn labh pradaan kiye jate hain, jaise ki muft ilaaj, prasav ke liye sahayata, aur poshan sahayata. 
⚠️ Yaad rahein: Main doctor nahi hoon. Serious takleef mein turant doctor se milein.

results.query: sarkari aspatal mein kya free milta hai?
results.response_preview:
Sarkari aspatal mein kai cheezein free mein milti hain, jaise ki:
- OPD mein doctor se milna
- Malaria, TB, HIV ka ilaaj
- Janani Suraksha Yojana ke under prasav
- Tikakaran (Vaccination)
- Family Pla...
results.full_response:
Sarkari aspatal mein kai cheezein free mein milti hain, jaise ki:
- OPD mein doctor se milna
- Malaria, TB, HIV ka ilaaj
- Janani Suraksha Yojana ke under prasav
- Tikakaran (Vaccination)
- Family Planning dawaiyan
- Iron aur folic acid tablets (pregnant mahilaon ke liye)
- ORS packets

Yaad rakhein: Sarkari PHC aur CHC mein bahut kuch free hai — paise ke wajah se ilaaj mat rokein.
⚠️ Yaad rahein: Main doctor nahi hoon. Serious takleef mein turant doctor se milein.
